content.full_text:
FAIR p OLJTICAL p RACTICES C OMMISSJON 
428 J Street • Suite 620 • Sacramento, CA 95814-2329 
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886 
Steven M. Perl 
Deputy County Counsel 
County of Marin 
3501 Civic Center Drive, Room 275 
San Rafael, CA 94903 
Re: 
Your Request for Advice 
Our File No. 14-ll0w 
Dear Mr. Perl: 
July 15, 2014 
This letter responds to your request for advice regarding the conflict of interest provisions 
of the Political Reform Act (the "Act").1 Per your request on July 15, 2014, we are withdrawing 
your request for advice. 
If you have other questions on this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660. 
HMR:jgl 
Sincerely, 
Zackery P. Morazzini 
General Counsel 
 )JJ(L L 
By: 
Heather M. Rowan 
Senior Counsel, Legal Division 
1 The Political Reform Act is contained in Government Code Sections 8 IOOO through 91014. All statutory 
references are to the Government Code, unless otherwise indicated. The regulations of the Fair Political Practices 
Commission are contained in Sections 18110 through 18997 of Title 2 of the California Code of Regulations. All 
regulatory references are to Title 2, Division 6 of the California Code of Regulations, unless otherwise indicated.

sections.question_synthetic: The requester sought advice regarding conflict of interest provisions under the Political Reform Act, but withdrew the request on July 15, 2014.
sections.conclusion_synthetic: The FPPC approved the withdrawal of the advice request per the requester's request dated July 15, 2014.
sections.parsing_notes: No section headers found; LLM: Withdrawal letter with no substantive question or conclusion sections. Document clearly states 'Per your request on July 15, 2014, we are withdrawing your request for advice.' File number 14-110W indicates this was originally an advice request that was subsequently withdrawn.

embedding.qa_text:
QUESTION: The requester sought advice regarding conflict of interest provisions under the Political Reform Act, but withdrew the request on July 15, 2014.

CONCLUSION: The FPPC approved the withdrawal of the advice request per the requester's request dated July 15, 2014.

embedding.summary: This is a withdrawal letter from the FPPC confirming that Steven M. Perl, Deputy County Counsel for Marin County, withdrew his request for advice regarding Political Reform Act conflict of interest provisions.
